Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES: Atty. DANIEL BERKO, ESQ., Tel No. 415-771-6174 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. MORGAN O. DURHAM, ESQ. of Bagaards Davis, Tel No. 619-200-2491 appearing for Defendants Uriah Chu and William Chu.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by parties. The Court takes DEFENDANTS URIAH CHU AND WILLIAM CHU'S Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Rosalie Zuniga under submission. Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Berko of Law Offices of Daniel Berko telephone number 415-771-6174 for Plaintiff.
Debra Bogaards of Bogaards Davis LLP telephone number 415-979-0480 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of arguement, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT URIAH CHU, WILLIAM CHU'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions is granted in part/denied in part. Counsel for the Defendant is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052, 925-360-6065. Reported. (302/JPT)
